title: Slime's Craft&Musket
description: Multiplayer tech and armory mod based on Vanilla Datapack.
body:
This mod/datapack is currently a multiplayer tech mod and gun mod based on the vanilla datapack, with ballistic fall, ballistic offset, misfire, chamber blast, moisture, recoil, and more!A total of 41 items (including 2 guidebooks, 6 muskets, 1 cannon, 5 machines) and 35 advancements (and hidden advancements) have been added, as well as crafting recipes for the vanilla Gunpowder and Cactus.

Installation: After downloading the file, copy it to the resourcepack folder of the corresponding game version in the versions directory and the datapacks folder of the corresponding archive in the saves directory.

This datapack uses CustomModelData:1025000-1025999.

if you can't craft Musketeer's Manual, use this command:

```
/function scm:craft/recipe_book
```

ps: I'm not the author of this datapack, I just helped him post on Modrinth and add some translations.
